title: LiCB 10 PCS SR920SW 371 LR920 AG6 370 1.55V Button Cell Watch Batteries
features: SAFE AND RELIABLE: LiCB Since 2006,Specialize in Battery 13 Years. SR920SW Button Coin Cell Tested under Strict Quality Control Standards. Grade A cells SR920SW Ensure Longer Battery Life and Long Lasting Power.
DURABLE AND COST-SAVING:Get the 10PCS Exact Fresh SR920SW Battery, Have Full 1.55 Volts Charge, 3 Years Shelf Life.

SAFETY AND LEAK FREE -- Zero Mercury LiCB SR920SW Batteries Offer Premium Performance in a Variety of Devices. LiCB Batteries are Designed not to Leak in Devices .During Their Usage and for up to 3 Years after They are Left in a Device.
MULTIPLE COMPATIBILITY : Equivalent to other Brand Models, Like 371, 370, SR920SW, 1188SO, SR69, SP370, 1171SO, SP371, V371, V370, G64, LR920, AG6, 605, GP71, RW315
WHAT YOU GET: 10 PCS SR920SW Batteries in Exact Blister Pack.18-month Warranty and Friendly Customer Service
